languages.text: "Ювенна... ты... неблагодарная..." {n}Живой глаз Себериана распахнут в изумлении.{/n} "Все это время ты помогала врагу? Привела его к порогу нашего дома? Как? Как ты могла?"

traits.locale_text: "Ювенна... ты... неблагодарная..." {n}Живой глаз Себериана распахнут в изумлении.{/n} "Все это время ты помогала врагу? Привела его к порогу нашего дома? Как? Как ты могла?"
traits.speaker: DLC3_DL_SeberianVonValancius

languages.text: "Juvenna... you... ungrateful..." {n}Seberian's organic eye widens in shock.{/n} "All this time you have been aiding the enemy? Bringing them to our doorstep? How? How could you?"
languages.original_text: "Ювенна... ты... неблагодарная..." {n}Живой глаз Себериана распахнут в изумлении.{/n} "Все это время ты помогала врагу? Привела его к порогу нашего дома? Как? Как ты могла?"

"Juvenna... you... ungrateful..." {n}Seberian's organic eye widens in shock.{/n} "All this time you have been aiding the enemy? Bringing them to our doorstep? How? How could you?"

languages.text: "Juvenna ... Ihr ... undankbare ..." {n}Seberians organisches Auge weitet sich schockiert.{/n} "Ihr habt all die Zeit den Feind unterstützt? Ihr habt ihn an unsere Türschwelle geführt? Wie? Wie konntet Ihr?"
languages.original_text: "Juvenna... you... ungrateful..." {n}Seberian's organic eye widens in shock.{/n} "All this time you have been aiding the enemy? Bringing them to our doorstep? How? How could you?"

traits.locale_text: "Juvenna ... Ihr ... undankbare ..." {n}Seberians organisches Auge weitet sich schockiert.{/n} "Ihr habt all die Zeit den Feind unterstützt? Ihr habt ihn an unsere Türschwelle geführt? Wie? Wie konntet Ihr?"

languages.text: “尤文娜……你这……忘恩负义……”{n}塞贝里安的有机肉眼因震惊而睁大。{/n}“这么久一直是你在通敌？把他们引到了家门口？怎么会？你怎么能这样？”
languages.original_text: "Juvenna... you... ungrateful..." {n}Seberian's organic eye widens in shock.{/n} "All this time you have been aiding the enemy? Bringing them to our doorstep? How? How could you?"

traits.locale_text: “尤文娜……你这……忘恩负义……”{n}塞贝里安的有机肉眼因震惊而睁大。{/n}“这么久一直是你在通敌？把他们引到了家门口？怎么会？你怎么能这样？”

languages.text: « Juvenna... Quelle ingratitude... » {n}L'œil organique de Seberian s'écarquille sous l'effet du choc.{/n} « Pendant tout ce temps, tu aidais l'ennemi ? Tu l'as mené à nos portes... Comment... Comment as-tu osé ? »
languages.original_text: "Juvenna... you... ungrateful..." {n}Seberian's organic eye widens in shock.{/n} "All this time you have been aiding the enemy? Bringing them to our doorstep? How? How could you?"

traits.locale_text: « Juvenna... Quelle ingratitude... » {n}L'œil organique de Seberian s'écarquille sous l'effet du choc.{/n} « Pendant tout ce temps, tu aidais l'ennemi ? Tu l'as mené à nos portes... Comment... Comment as-tu osé ? »

languages.text: «Juvenna... tú... desagradecida...». {n}El ojo orgánico de Seberian se abre como un plato por la sorpresa.{/n} «¿Has estado ayudando al enemigo todo este tiempo? ¿Los has traído hasta nuestras puertas? ¿Cómo? ¿Cómo has podido?».
languages.original_text: "Juvenna... you... ungrateful..." {n}Seberian's organic eye widens in shock.{/n} "All this time you have been aiding the enemy? Bringing them to our doorstep? How? How could you?"

traits.locale_text: «Juvenna... tú... desagradecida...». {n}El ojo orgánico de Seberian se abre como un plato por la sorpresa.{/n} «¿Has estado ayudando al enemigo todo este tiempo? ¿Los has traído hasta nuestras puertas? ¿Cómo? ¿Cómo has podido?».

languages.text: "Juvenna... Seni... Nankör..." {n}Seberian'ın organik gözü, şaşkınlıkla fal taşı gibi açılıyor.{/n} "Bunca zaman düşmana mı yardım ediyordun? Onları kapımıza mı getirdin? Nasıl? Bunu nasıl yapabildin?"
languages.original_text: "Juvenna... you... ungrateful..." {n}Seberian's organic eye widens in shock.{/n} "All this time you have been aiding the enemy? Bringing them to our doorstep? How? How could you?"

traits.locale_text: "Juvenna... Seni... Nankör..." {n}Seberian'ın organik gözü, şaşkınlıkla fal taşı gibi açılıyor.{/n} "Bunca zaman düşmana mı yardım ediyordun? Onları kapımıza mı getirdin? Nasıl? Bunu nasıl yapabildin?"

languages.text: 「ジュベナ…お前…恩知らず…」{n}シベリアンの有機眼が衝撃で大きく開く.{/n}「この間ずっと敵を助けていたのか？敵を我々の戸口にまで連れてきたのか？どうやって？どうして？」
languages.original_text: "Juvenna... you... ungrateful..." {n}Seberian's organic eye widens in shock.{/n} "All this time you have been aiding the enemy? Bringing them to our doorstep? How? How could you?"
